Thought leadershipJune 26, 2026
Jesse Hendon - Group Expert - June 23
Google Business Profile - the most ignored free tool in insurance
"Less than 10% of agents in the room had their Google Business Profile set up. Nearly every agent wants more high-quality local leads. Yet 90% haven't claimed the single most powerful, free local marketing tool on the planet."
494 reach - 11 reactions - 15 comments
Member reactions
Erin Chen
"I've had mine since 2018 and worked hard to generate 90x 5-star reviews and have gotten many calls from it. Better than any paid ad out there!"
Rosie Paulsen
"I get one or two calls a quarter from this. During AEP I will get more. Google has been complimentary marketing for my business."
Steve Pomerantz
"I have my VA watch it as one of her duties. We are number 1 in our area."
Brianne Lehigh
"I have had a Google business page for years and rarely get any calls. What am I missing? I have about 25 five-star reviews."
Jesse's challenge to the group
"Stop buying leads until you've claimed your free space on Google. Agents - what's holding you back from setting yours up?"

HubSpot IMN Community Funnel - June 26, 2026
395 known prospects in HubSpot
Email capture gap - opportunity ahead
We don't have emails for 1,000+ members in the group. Cross-referencing HubSpot and AT suggests many are likely prospects. Priority: capture more emails through gated content - AEP Resource Hub, AEP booklets, IMN huddles, Spark gated content, and virtual events will all support this.
